g.text: - service_worker.py is always the same script,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: but started with different parameters (host, port)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - service_worker.py is basically socket server to which the core connects

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - models-root folder will be shipped indepdendentelly from core server

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - When the Inference Server Core is started,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: it reads the models-root folder and looks for requirements.txt,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: which includes versions of all Python dependencies needed for models

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - It automatically creates the Python virtual env and install the dependencies into it

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - All the worker processes are started with this created virtual env
